---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

## Employements

1.  Detaysoft, Junior BPC consultant, September 2025 - ongoing


## Internships

1.  Detaysoft, BI intern, 2025


# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python 

# Hobbies
Reading, listening to music, learning new technologies, and self-development
